blockers.description: Repo has no API key secrets configured. Real-eval CI job needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + OPENAI_API_KEY. User deferred providing these to a later session.
blockers.workaround: gh secret set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY --body 'sk-ant-...' && gh secret set OPENAI_API_KEY --body 'sk-...'

blockers.description: data/eval/baseline.json does not exist yet — needs make baseline-lock TS=<ts> after a representative real-eval report commits.
blockers.workaround: Run make baseline-lock TS=<ts> after real-eval workflow_dispatch lands a representative:true report under data/eval/reports/<ts>/

blockers.description: docs/hero.gif not recorded — user-owned screen capture per docs/HERO-STORYBOARD.md.
blockers.workaround: Record per storyboard after baseline.json lands

human_actions_pending.action: Configure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and OPENAI_API_KEY repo secrets via gh secret set or GitHub Settings UI
human_actions_pending.context: Without these, the real-eval workflow crashes mid-eval with ValueError: DOCINTEL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is required when llm_provider='real'. The Phase 14 ci.yml env-block now references secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY (commit 06d1c29) so secrets are wired to env once configured.

human_actions_pending.action: Run gh workflow run ci.yml --ref phase/14-empirical-closure then gh run watch <run-id>
human_actions_pending.context: Triggers real-eval. ~8-20 min wall time (cold start + corpus index build + 32-question eval over real Anthropic/OpenAI APIs). Workflow commits data/eval/reports/<ts>/ with [skip ci].
Per D-08: confirm representative:true, Hit@3 differential on 8 canary cases, cost_usd in $1-$2 sanity band. If anything looks off, re-run before make baseline-lock.

Writes data/eval/baseline.json with the 7-field D-07 schema, commits as chore(baseline): lock v1.0 baseline @ <ts>. Validation gates: representative=true, eval_set sha256 matches frozen constant, manifest cost telemetry sums correctly.
Rewrites README.md PASTE-REAL-NUMBERS HTML-comment anchors with real headline metrics + representative:true. Commit message: docs(README): paste real numbers per EMP-02 / D-10.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify UI auto-flip: uv run python -c 'from pathlib import Path; from docintel_ui.eval_view import _find_eval_report; print(_find_eval_report(Path("data")))'
human_actions_pending.context: Pitfall 5 — UI eval_view.py already auto-detects representative:true reports. Output must be (PosixPath('data/eval/reports/<ts>'), True). This is verification, not code change.

human_actions_pending.action: Record docs/hero.gif per docs/HERO-STORYBOARD.md, commit, push
human_actions_pending.context: EMP-03 / D-11. Storyboard: multi-hop comparative answer -> hoverable citation tooltips -> out-of-corpus refusal -> Traces Gantt -> Eval-Results tab with representative:true. Must be recorded AFTER baseline.json lands so the UI shows real numbers.

decisions.decision: Use --auto chain to drive plan-phase 14 into execute-phase --no-transition
decisions.rationale: User explicitly invoked /gsd-plan-phase 14 --auto. Plan-phase auto-advanced into execute-phase with no transition (so a parent can chain the next phase if any).

decisions.decision: Create phase/14-empirical-closure branch off main before dispatching execute-phase
decisions.rationale: CLAUDE.md project rule: 'One phase = one branch'. The discuss-phase branch-set was 'none' (project quirk per memory), so the branch was created at the plan->execute boundary.

decisions.decision: Use isolation=worktree parallel agents for Waves 0-2
decisions.rationale: Wave 0 single plan (auto serial), Wave 1 and Wave 2 each had 2 plans with zero file overlap per plan-checker. Parallel worktrees + sequential Agent() dispatch per #2924 to avoid .git/config.lock race.

decisions.decision: Auto-fix pre-existing lint debt (UP035/RUF022/RUF002/RUF003 + 9 black reformats in trace.py/types.py/ui/eval) in Phase 14 scope
decisions.rationale: main's CI was already red on these — surfacing during real-eval dispatch made the pre-existing breakage block EMP-01. Scoping these into Phase 14 (commit 0408d80) was the only way to unblock the real-eval gate. Justified as 'CI-unbreak debt incurred by Phase 13 PR #7 that downstream phases pay'.

decisions.decision: Wire secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY env passthrough in all 3 real-mode ci.yml jobs
decisions.rationale: First real-eval dispatch revealed the v1.0 workflow YAML never wired API keys despite Phase 10's D-10 plan assuming it would work. This is EMP-01 wiring debt — commit 06d1c29 closes it.

decisions.decision: Defer Wave 3 + Wave 4 user-action work to a later session
decisions.rationale: User chose to defer providing live API keys. The autonomous parts of Phase 14 (Waves 0-2 + lint + CI wiring) are 5/7 plans done and clean; the remaining 2 plans are entirely user-driven (real-eval trigger + hero GIF recording).

uncommitted_files: .planning/* (gitignored modifications — commit_docs:false; not part of work product)
next_action: Configure 2 repo secrets: gh secret set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY --body 'sk-ant-...' && gh secret set OPENAI_API_KEY --body 'sk-...'. Then re-run /gsd-execute-phase 14 OR follow the 4-step user-owned sequence in docs/REAL-RUN-CHECKLIST.md Phase 14 section.
context_notes: Phase 14 closes EMPIRICAL-PENDING debt from v1.0. Plans 14-01..14-05 landed all autonomous infrastructure. Plans 14-06 and 14-07 are autonomous:false by design — they need user-owned actions (real-eval CI trigger, baseline lock review, hero GIF recording) per CONTEXT.md D-08 and D-11. The Wave 3 dispatch hit a real-world gap: the v1.0 workflow YAML never wired API key secrets to the real-mode jobs' env blocks. Phase 14 grew to include that wiring fix (commit 06d1c29) plus pre-existing CI lint debt cleanup (commit 0408d80) so the documented EMP-01 sequence (gh workflow run ci.yml -> make baseline-lock -> make readme-paste) can actually work when the user resumes.
